overall.description: Game engine footage showing a first-person drive through a city street with a depth-map mesh visualization overlay. The camera moves steadily forward between tall buildings, passing a white van and navigating streets lined with debris piles before turning at an intersection to reveal a building with distinctive orange facade details.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon between historic and modern buildings

events.description: white van appears in the distance ahead, approaching slowly

agents.ego_description: driving steadily forward through the city street between tall buildings

entered.detail: dark stone building with arched windows and weathered facade
tall building with green copper roof and grid-patterned windows
translucent white mesh piles resembling snow or rubble covering the road edges
tall spire visible at the end of the street corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a steady drive through an urban canyon flanked by a dark historic building on the left and a modern tower on the right. The street is littered with translucent debris piles visible through the depth-map visualization. A white van appears in the distance as the camera advances.

events.description: white van passes by on the right side of the street
green trees become visible on the left side ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as a van passes by on the right, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: white van driving in the opposite direction, passing by the camera

entered.detail: green leafy trees lining the left side of the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera continues driving forward as a white van approaches and passes on the right. The street remains flanked by the same buildings, but trees become visible in the distance on the left, indicating a transition to a more vegetated area.

events.description: passing the mature trees on the left, revealing more of the building facades

agents.ego_description: driving forward past the tree-lined section of the street, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: large stone building with distinctive orange circular details on the ground floor, visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The camera drives past mature trees on the left side of the street, with the historic building receding into the distance. A large corner building with distinctive orange circular facade details becomes visible ahead as the camera approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with prominent corner building

events.description: camera begins turning right to navigate the intersection
view shifts to show the side facade of the corner building with orange details

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection to view the corner building from a new angle

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the intersection, bringing the corner building with orange circular details into close view on the left. The modern tower remains prominent on the right as the camera completes the turn, revealing new angles of the urban architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive through a dense urban canyon that gradually opens up and turns toward a distinctive architectural landmark. It begins by advancing between a dark historic building and a modern tower, passing translucent debris piles visualized through a depth-map overlay as a white van appears in the distance. As the camera continues forward, the van passes on the right and the cityscape begins to shift, with mature trees appearing on the left as the historic building recedes. The scene then opens toward an intersection where a large corner building with orange circular facade details comes into view. Finally, the camera turns right, bringing the orange architectural details into close proximity on the left while the modern tower remains prominent on the right.
